behind the stage winners team oritse Scott can be satisfied today the team of Esteban Chavez and the Yates brothers finishes on rank 517 seconds behind the untouchable team BMC tomorrow on Sunday the vuelta stays in France it goes through the region occitania along the shore of the Mediterranean Sea no mountains but the wind expected at 50 kilometers an hour will have to be reckoned with this should not prevent the sprinters to fight for the stage win at the seaside resort of Greece on you
